name: Luminar Technologies, Inc.
description: Luminar Technologies, Inc. is an American automotive technology company that specializes in the development of advanced lidar sensors and machine perception software for autonomous vehicles and advanced driver-assistance systems (ADAS). Founded in 2012, the company focuses on creating high-performance, safety-critical hardware and software platforms designed to enable vehicles to perceive their surroundings with greater accuracy than traditional camera or radar-based systems. Luminar works with major global automotive manufacturers to integrate its technology into production vehicles, aiming to enhance road safety and facilitate the transition toward fully autonomous driving capabilities.
